description: Style Note Gear up your little hero for his everyday adventures with this pair of floaters from Spider-Man. Its cushioned footbed and grooved outsole let him stay on his feet all day long. Pair it with a cotton tee and shorts for an outing in the park. Product Details Yellow printed synthetic leather straps on the forefoot, midfoot and backfoot Velcro closure on the midfoot strap with branding Ergonomically curved footbed with grooves for grip Rubber outsole with grooves for absolute grip and traction Material and Care Synthetic, rubber Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store under sunlight  Style NoteGear up your little hero for his everyday adventures with this pair of floaters from Spider-Man.
